positive: A majestic, stylized grizzly bear standing upright on its hind legs, viewed in a powerful, commanding silhouette. The bear is framed against a vibrant, minimalist watercolor background of glowing aurora borealis and stylized mountain peaks. Use strong, deep indigo and electric teal accents combined with earthy sepia tones for a striking, high-contrast look. The bear should have clean, sharply defined edges suitable for direct apparel printing. Composition should be centered and highly dynamic, evoking wilderness wonder. Vector illustration quality, clean line art, graphic novel style, high saturation, perfect symmetry, cinematic lighting, high detail, ultra-clean.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, signature, copyright, faded, messy, photorealism, noisy
